title: Everbuild Jetcem Plaster Rapid Repair, 6 kg
features: Dries hard in 1 hour to a smooth finish which can be further sanded if desired
Features added PVA powder resulting in a finish that will not shrink or crack and is strong enough to accept nails or screws
Ideal for use on internal repairs of plasterboard, brick, wood, stone and most other building materials
Can be overpainted or wallpapered over if required once dry
description: From the manufacturer JetCem For quick repairs everywhere JetCem Patching Plaster Quick Setting A high strength patching plaster Areas for use : Plaster Plasterboard Brick Wood Stone Most other building materials Pack size : 6kg bag Colour: White Advantages Dries in 1 hour. Easy mixing, just add water. Adheres to most common building surfaces. Overpaintable. Doesn't shrink or crack. Our methods of application Thoroughly wet surfaces to improve adhesion. Using clean, dry tools, mix Jetcem rapid setting sand and cement with clean, cold water to a smooth paste. Always use a clean mixing vessel and add approx. 2 ┬╜ parts powder to one part by volume clean cold water and mix immediately to a smooth paste. The mixed plaster will remain workable for 30-40 minutes. Smooth the Everbuild Jetcem Patching Plaster over the repair with a trowel. Finish with a wet knife, if sanding is desired fill the hole slightly proud to allow for sanding down. Finishing : Everbuild JetCem Patching Plaster is normally sandable and overpaintable after approximately one hour. Once dry, sand to a smooth finish. May be painted or papered when dry. Good to know For holes deeper than 4cm / 1 ┬╜ inch, apply in layers and allow to dry before applying second layer. Do not add further water once the plaster has started to go off. Remix a fresh batch. Allow to fully dry before over coating. Only use on porous surfaces. Do not apply over plastics, sealants or paints. Wood repairs тАУ do not use in areas where impact resistance or flexibility is required. Do not use below 10┬░C.
